The '''''Meteor Racer''''' was one of the 600 refugee [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that were trapped on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded. The Yuuzhan Vong used these ships and their passengers as [[Human/Legends|Human]] shields in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
